networkPrograms.notes: OsloMet 2026/27: non-EU master's €67,000–95,000 NOK/year (mid-range NOK 81,000 for business/economics). EU/EEA: no tuition; semester fee NOK 690/semester (SiO).
OsloMet 2026/27: ACIT/engineering master's NOK 95,000/year non-EU. EU/EEA tuition-free + semester fee.
Nord University 2026/27: non-EU master's NOK 141,000–320,000/year; business/economics lower band NOK 141,000. EU/EEA tuition-free + semester fee.
UiS 2026/27: non-EU master's NOK 60,000–85,000/year; business mid-range NOK 72,500. EU/EEA tuition-free.
UiA 2026/27: non-EU NOK 47,000–135,000/year; business/economics mid-range NOK 91,000.
NMBU Category 1 (2026/27): NOK 80,000/year — Applied Economics, International Relations, etc. EU/EEA tuition-free.
UiB 2026/27: non-EU master's NOK 197,000–401,700/year; economics lower band.
UiO 2026/27: non-EU master's NOK 204,000–295,000/year. EU/EEA tuition-free + semester fee.
DTU 2026/27: non-EU €7,500/semester = €15,000/year (€30,000 total 2-year MSc). EU/EEA tuition-free. Fees may be revised Autumn 2026.
AAU 2026/27: non-EU DKK 134,000/year (2-year MSc). EU/EEA tuition-free.
Aarhus University 2026/27: non-EU DKK 153,000/year. EU/EEA tuition-free.
KU Copenhagen 2026/27: non-EU DKK 140,000/year. EU/EEA tuition-free.
Iceland public universities: no tuition; annual registration fee ISK 75,000 (University of Iceland 2026/27). 2-year master's total ISK 150,000 registration.
Iceland public universities: no tuition; annual registration fee ISK 75,000.
University of Galway 2026/27: EU €9,600; non-EU €21,640 (MSc Data Science / Business Analytics band).
